description: Case style: Stainless steel circular case Dial style: Black textured dial, steel colour hands with white accents, branding near the 12 and 6 hour mark, white and red markings Strap style: Black resin strap with a tang closure, holes for a customised fit Features: Analog watch, screw to reset time Water resistance: Up to 30 m Warranty: One year from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
